executives.name: Jennifer Parmentier
executives.background: Ms. Parmentier has served as Chief Executive Officer since January 2023 and Chairman of the Board since January 2024. She previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2021 to 2022 and Vice President and President – Motion Systems Group from 2019 to 2021.

executives.name: Andrew Ross
executives.background: Mr. Ross has served as President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Vice President and President – Engineered Materials Group from 2015 to 2022.

executives.name: Todd Leombruno
executives.background: Mr. Leombruno has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2021. He previously served as Vice President and Controller from 2017 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

board_of_directors.name: Jennifer Parmentier
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Parker-Hannifin Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Lee Banks
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice Chairman and President of Parker-Hannifin Corporation. He served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2015 to 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Jillian Evanko
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Chart Industries, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Scaminace
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of OM Group, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: James Verrier
board_of_directors.background: Former President and Chief Executive Officer of BorgWarner Inc.

sources.source_description: Parker Hannifin Official Management Team Website
